data-end="1647"><font style="font-size: 15px;">ACE Recognition Pattern</font></strong></p><div align="left">✓ Users consume applications<br>✓ Applications depend on infrastructure</div><div align="left">✓ Infrastructure depends on networking</div><div align="left">✓ Networking depends on physical resources</div><div align="left">✓ Google abstracts infrastructure complexity</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="165" width="267" x="93" y="179" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dEWtZMVpjyWvetbbhhPl-28" edge="1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<div align="left"><font style="font-size: 14px;">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;Higher layers consume services provided by lower layers, while Google Cloud abstracts the underlying infrastructure to simplify application deployment and operations.</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="53" width="622" x="143" y="671" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
